name: Grimjaw Ironhand
who:
Dwarf blacksmith, been here 40 years
Gruff but secretly kind
Lost his wife to plague, throws himself into work
what:
Sells weapons and armor
Can repair gear
Knows rumors about old dwarf mines
Complains about bandits attacking trade routes
where:
Thornfield smithy
Never leaves his forge
quests: Stolen Tools, later: Explore Old Mines
